source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
MetricCode AS IncentiveMetricID,
MetricName AS IncentiveMetricName,
MetricDirection,
PBI_MetricCal,
UOM,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM ODS.INCENTIVE_METRICS

SELECT  
IncentivePlanCode AS IncentivePlanID,
IncentivePlanCategory,
IncentivePlanName,
PlanType AS IncentivePlanType,
[Function],
SubSourceFlag,
SubSourceID,
EffectiveFrom,
EffectiveTo,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM [ODS].[INCENTIVE_PLANS]

SELECT 
1000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M1.EmployeeID,M1.EffectiveFrom) AS EmployeePK,
M1.EmployeeID,
COALESCE(M2.IncentivePlanID,'NA') AS IncentivePlanID,
M1.Division,
M1.EmployeeName,
M1.[Function],
M1.Role,
M1.BaseSalary,
M1.Pct_TargetBonus,
( M1.BaseSalary * M1.Pct_TargetBonus ) AS EligibleIncentiveTarget,
M1.RegionID,
M1.PersonalVolumeMetric,
M1.PV_OverridePct,
M1.PV_Regional_At_Division_Override,
M1.EffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM ODS.INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE M1
LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN] M2
	ON M1.IncentivePlanCode = M2.IncentivePlanID

SELECT 
CONCAT('ALLOC_',SUBSTRING(M1.IncentivePlanCode,1,8),'_',CAST(M1.IncentiveAllocationID AS VARCHAR(20))) AS IncentiveAllocationID,
M3.IncentivePlanID AS IncentivePlanID,
M2.IncentiveMetricID,
M1.AllocationPct,
M1.DistributionType,
M1.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.ScaleID AS IncentiveScaleID,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM 
(
	SELECT
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IncentivePlanCode,[Function],MetricCode,DistributionType) AS IncentiveAllocationID, 
	IncentivePlanCode,
	[Function],
	MetricCode,
	AllocationPct,
	DistributionType,
	RegionalMetricFlag,
	ScaleID
	FROM  [ODS].[INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION]
	
	) M1

	JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS] M2
	ON M1.MetricCode = M2.IncentiveMetricID

	JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN] M3
	ON M1.IncentivePlanCode = M3.IncentivePlanID

	JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ScaleID FROM EDW_INC.REF_INCENTIVE_SCALE) M4
	ON M1.ScaleID = M4.ScaleID

scripts.text:
SELECT 
		CASE 
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='Gross Profit' 														THEN 'GROSS_PROFIT'
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='EBITDA' AND TRIM(Market)!='Renuity (excl Project Home)'				THEN 'DIVISION_EBITDA'
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='EBITDA' AND TRIM(Market) ='Renuity (excl Project Home)'				THEN 'ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_EBITDA'
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='Contact Center' 			THEN 'CC_COST'
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='Marketing & Advertising' 	THEN 'MARKETING_COST'
		WHEN TRIM(Account)='Net Revenue' 				THEN 'NET_REVENUE'
		ELSE TRIM(Account) END AS Account,
		
		EOMONTH(
				DATEFROMPARTS(
					2000 + RIGHT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Period)), 2),  -- Year (26 → 2026)
					CASE LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Period)), 3)      -- Month
						WHEN 'Jan' THEN 1
						WHEN 'Feb' THEN 2
						WHEN 'Mar' THEN 3
						WHEN 'Apr' THEN 4
						WHEN 'May' THEN 5
						WHEN 'Jun' THEN 6
						WHEN 'Jul' THEN 7
						WHEN 'Aug' THEN 8
						WHEN 'Sep' THEN 9
						WHEN 'Oct' THEN 10
						WHEN 'Nov' THEN 11
						WHEN 'Dec' THEN 12
					END,
					1
				)
			) AS PeriodDate,
		CASE 
				WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
				THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
				ELSE NULL
				END  AS ACU_ID,
		TRIM(Market)				AS Market_SRC,
		TRIM([Marketing Source])	AS MarketingSource_SRC,
		[Actual Group] AS ActualValue,
		[Budget - Division] AS BudgetValue
		
		INTO #T_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS
		FROM [ODS].INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS;
		
		
--****************************************


SELECT * INTO 
#T_REF_SALES_BUDGETS 
FROM 

(

		SELECT
		'ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT' AS Account,
		Date AS PeriodDate,
		CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END  AS ACU_ID,
		TRIM(Market) AS Market_SRC,
		TRIM(Source) AS MarketingSource,
		NULL AS ActualValue,
		SUM(Issue_Count) AS BudgetValue
		FROM RDM.REF_SALES_BUDGETS WHERE YEar=2026
		GROUP BY Date,CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END,TRIM(Market),TRIM(Source)
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT
		'NETSALES_AMT' AS Account,
		Date AS PeriodDate,
		CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END  AS ACU_ID,
		TRIM(Market) AS Market_SRC,
		TRIM(Source) AS MarketingSource,
		NULL AS ActualValue,
		SUM(NetSales_Amt) AS BudgetValue
		FROM RDM.REF_SALES_BUDGETS WHERE YEar=2026
		GROUP BY Date,CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END,TRIM(Market),TRIM(Source)
			
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT
		'RAW_LEAD_COUNT' AS Account,
		Date AS PeriodDate,
		CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END  AS ACU_ID,
		TRIM(Market) AS Market_SRC,
		TRIM(Source) AS MarketingSource,
		NULL AS ActualValue,
		SUM(Raw_Count) AS BudgetValue
		FROM RDM.REF_SALES_BUDGETS WHERE YEar=2026
		GROUP BY Date,CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END,TRIM(Market),TRIM(Source)
			
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT
		'NETSALES_COUNT' AS Account,
		Date AS PeriodDate,
		CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END  AS ACU_ID,
		TRIM(Market) AS Market_SRC,
		TRIM(Source) AS MarketingSource,
		NULL AS ActualValue,
		SUM(NetSales_Count) AS BudgetValue
		FROM RDM.REF_SALES_BUDGETS WHERE YEar=2026
		GROUP BY Date,CASE 
			WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4) LIKE '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
			THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(Market)), 4)
			ELSE NULL
			END,TRIM(Market),TRIM(Source)
	
	) M1
		



--****************************************

SELECT *,
CASE 
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '1%' THEN 'H.Rite Window'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '2%' THEN 'A.East Florida'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '3%' THEN 'B.Statewide'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '4%' THEN 'C.Mad City'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '5%' THEN 'I.Home Org'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '6%' THEN 'H.Rite Window'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '7%' THEN 'A.East Gulf'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '8%' AND ACU_ID NOT LIKE '81%' THEN 'G.West Division'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '81%' THEN 'G.Pacific Gutter'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '01%' OR ACU_ID LIKE '03%' THEN 'I.Home Org'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '0001%' OR ACU_ID LIKE '0003%' THEN '0.Home Base'
	WHEN ACU_ID LIKE '9%' THEN '0.Bylt'
	ELSE NULL END AS UNI_CompanyReporting	
	
INTO #T_ACTUAL_1
FROM 
	( SELECT * FROM  #T_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS
		UNION ALL 
	  SELECT * FROM #T_REF_SALES_BUDGETS 
	  ) M1;

--****************************

SELECT *,
CASE 
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('A.East Florida','A.East Gulf') 		THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('H.Rite Window') 						THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('B.Statewide') 						THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('C.Mad City') 						THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('I.Home Org') 						THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('G.West Division','G.Pacific Gutter') THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN UNI_CompanyReporting IN ('0.Bylt','0.Home Base','0.Renuity') 	THEN 'REN'
	ELSE NULL END AS Division
INTO #T_ACTUAL
FROM #T_ACTUAL_1;




UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='FHI',UNI_CompanyReporting='A.East Florida' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC IN ('East','East Florida');
UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='FHI',UNI_CompanyReporting='A.East Gulf' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC IN ('East Gulf');

UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='CTA',UNI_CompanyReporting='I.Home Org' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC IN ('Home Org','Project Home');


UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='MAC',UNI_CompanyReporting='C.Mad City' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC IN ('Mad City');

UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='REN',UNI_CompanyReporting='0.Home Base' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC LIKE ('%Renuity%');
UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='REN',UNI_CompanyReporting='0.Home Base' WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC IN ('Home Base');

UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='RTW',UNI_CompanyReporting='H.Rite Window'  WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC LIKE ('%Rite%');

UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='SWR',UNI_CompanyReporting='B.Statewide'  WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC LIKE ('%Statewide%');

UPDATE #T_ACTUAL SET Division ='PBC',UNI_CompanyReporting='G.West Division'  WHERE Division IS NULL AND Market_SRC LIKE ('%West%');

--**************************************




SELECT
M1.Account,
M1.PeriodDate,
M1.ACU_ID,
M2.BranchName AS ACU_BranchName,
M1.UNI_CompanyReporting,
COALESCE(M1.Division,M3.Division) AS Division,
M1.ActualValue,
M1.BudgetValue,

M1.Market_SRC,
M1.MarketingSource_SRC
INTO #T_1
FROM 
#T_ACTUAL M1

LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH M2 
ON M1.ACU_ID = M2.BranchCode

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT A.Division,A.ACU_ID FROM EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN A 
			JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B ON A.Division= B.Division
			WHERE A.ACU_ID IN 
			(
				SELECT ACU_ID FROM 
					(
						SELECT DISTINCT A.Division,A.ACU_ID FROM EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN A 
						JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B ON A.Division= B.Division
						) M1
						GROUP BY ACU_ID
						HAVING COUNT(1)=1
					)
			) M3
ON M1.ACU_ID = M3.ACU_ID;




--************************



SELECT *,
    CASE 
	
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Events%'                   THEN 'Events'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Retail%'                   THEN 'Retail'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Canvas%'                   THEN 'Canvass'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Agents Referral%'          THEN 'Agents Referral'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Shared Mail%'              THEN 'Shared Mail'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Shared%'                   THEN 'Shared'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Exclusive%'                THEN 'Exclusive'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Manufacturer%'             THEN 'Manufacturer'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Branded Partner%'          THEN 'Branded Partner'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Paid Search%'              THEN 'Paid Search'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Paid Social%'              THEN 'Paid Social'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Native%'		           THEN 'Native'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Email%'                    THEN 'Email'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Organic Web%'              THEN 'Organic/SEO'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Lead Nurturing%'           THEN 'Lead Nurturing'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Direct Mail%'              THEN 'Direct Mail'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Newspapers%'               THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Radio%'                    THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%TV%'                       THEN 'Broadcast TV'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Out of Home%'              THEN 'Out of Home'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Consumer Referral%'        THEN 'Consumer Referral'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Employee Referral%' OR MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Employee Discount%'        THEN 'Employee Referral'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Paid Directories%'         THEN 'Directories'
		WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%YouTube%'         		   THEN 'YouTube'
		WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Programmatic%'         	   THEN 'Programmatic'
		

		WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%None Marketing Source%'    THEN 'None Marketing Source'
		WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Consumer Incentives%'      THEN 'Consumer Incentives'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Content%'                  THEN 'Content'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Online Presence%'          THEN 'Online Presence'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Creative/Research%'        THEN 'Creative/Research'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Branding Media%'           THEN 'Branding Media'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Company Merchandise%'      THEN 'Company Merchandise'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%MarTech%'                  THEN 'MarTech'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Marketing Dept%'           THEN 'Marketing Dept'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%All Marketing Sources%'    THEN 'All Marketing Sources'
        WHEN MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Marketing Source - Other%' THEN 'Marketing Source - Other'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS SourceCode
INTO #T_2
FROM #T_1;




--**********************************




SELECT
A.*,B.*,
CASE 
		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Gift Cards%'               THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Content%'                  THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Online Presence%'          THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Website%'                  THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Communications%'           THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Creative/Research%'        THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Branding Media%'           THEN 'Branding'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Company Merchandise%'      THEN 'Branding'
		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Consumer Incentives%'      THEN 'Branding'

		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%None Marketing Source%'		THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Affiliates - Exclusive%'      THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Affiliates - Manufacturer%'   THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'
        WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Performance - Aggregators%'   THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'
		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%MarTech%'						THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'
		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Marketing Dept%'				THEN 'Marketing Dept & Tech'

		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%HRC Tech & Services%'			THEN 'Call Center'

		WHEN A.MarketingSource_SRC LIKE '%Marketing Source - Other%'	THEN 'Marketing Source - Other'

ELSE NULL 
END AS MarketingSource_SRC_1

INTO #T_3
FROM  #T_2 A 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT TX_SourceGroup,TX_SourceCode FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING
			WHERE TX_Channel!='0') B
ON A.SourceCode = B.TX_SourceCode;




--*******************************

TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS];




INSERT INTO [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS]



SELECT 
Account 		AS Metric,
'MONTHLY' 		AS DistributionType,
Division,
UNI_CompanyReporting,
Year(PeriodDate) AS Year,
PeriodDate,
Market_SRC 			AS Source_Market,
MarketingSource_SRC AS Source_MarketingSource,

ACU_ID,
ACU_BranchName,

CASE WHEN SourceCode='All Marketing Sources' THEN 'All Marketing Sources' ELSE SourceGroup END AS SourceGroup,
SourceCode,
ActualValue,
BudgetValue,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS

FROM
(
	SELECT
	Account,
	PeriodDate,
	ACU_ID,
	ACU_BranchName,
	Division,
	ActualValue,
	BudgetValue,
	UNI_CompanyReporting,
	
	Market_SRC,
	MarketingSource_SRC,
	COALESCE(TX_SourceGroup,MarketingSource_SRC_1) AS SourceGroup,
	COALESCE(TX_SourceCode,SourceCode) AS SourceCode
	FROM  #T_3

	) M1;

DECLARE @Year INT = 2026;

DELETE FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
WHERE Metric IN ('SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX', 'NPS', 'CUSTOMER_EXPERIENCE_INDEX');


WITH CAL AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS PeriodDate
    FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR
    WHERE YEAR(CalendarDate) = @Year
),
PRE_METRIC AS 
(
	SELECT 'SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX'  AS Metric, 4.4  AS BudgetValue
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'NPS',                                 75.0  AS BudgetValue
),

METRICS AS
(
    
	SELECT * FROM PRE_METRIC
	
	UNION ALL 
	
	SELECT 'CUSTOMER_EXPERIENCE_INDEX' AS Metric, ( ( A1.BudgetValue * 10 ) + (A2.BudgetValue / 2 ) ) AS BudgetValue
	FROM
		(SELECT * FROM PRE_METRIC WHERE Metric='SALES_SATISFACTION_INDEX') A1
		JOIN 
		(SELECT * FROM PRE_METRIC WHERE Metric='NPS') A2
		ON 1=1
)

INSERT INTO [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS]

SELECT 
    M.Metric                        AS Metric,
    'MONTHLY'                       AS DistributionType,
    D.Division                      AS Division,
    CASE 
        WHEN D.Division = 'FHI' THEN 'A.East Division'
        WHEN D.Division = 'SWR' THEN 'B.Statewide'
        WHEN D.Division = 'RTW' THEN 'H.Rite Window'
        WHEN D.Division = 'MAC' THEN 'C.Mad City'
        WHEN D.Division = 'CTA' THEN 'I.Home Org'
        WHEN D.Division = 'PBC' THEN 'G.West Division'
        ELSE NULL 
    END                             AS UNI_CompanyReporting,
    @Year                           AS Year,
    CAST(C.PeriodDate AS DATE)      AS PeriodDate,
    NULL                            AS Source_Market,
    NULL                            AS Source_MarketingSource,
    NULL                            AS ACU_ID,
    NULL                            AS ACU_BranchName,
    NULL                            AS SourceGroup,
    NULL                            AS SourceCode,
    NULL                            AS ActualValue,
    M.BudgetValue                   AS BudgetValue,
    GETDATE()                       AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM CAL C
CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS) D
CROSS JOIN METRICS M;









DELETE FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
WHERE Metric IN ('ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_SCORECARD');


WITH CAL AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS PeriodDate
    FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR
    WHERE YEAR(CalendarDate) = @Year
),
METRICS AS
(
    SELECT 'ENTERPRISE_POOL-RENUITY_SCORECARD'  AS Metric, 1.00  AS BudgetValue
)

INSERT INTO [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS]

SELECT 
    M.Metric                        AS Metric,
    'MONTHLY'                       AS DistributionType,
    D.Division                      AS Division,
    CASE 
        WHEN D.Division = 'REN' THEN '0.Home Base'
        ELSE NULL 
    END                             AS UNI_CompanyReporting,
    @Year                           AS Year,
    CAST(C.PeriodDate AS DATE)      AS PeriodDate,
    NULL                            AS Source_Market,
    NULL                            AS Source_MarketingSource,
    NULL                            AS ACU_ID,
    NULL                            AS ACU_BranchName,
    NULL                            AS SourceGroup,
    NULL                            AS SourceCode,
    NULL                            AS ActualValue,
    M.BudgetValue                   AS BudgetValue,
    GETDATE()                       AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM CAL C
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'REN' Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS) D
CROSS JOIN METRICS M;
